name: HaluStripDUO
comment:
100cm dual layer LED bar with 14x 2700K 4° Beams + 3x42 RGBWW pixels IP65.
The HaluStrip DUO is a dual layer LED strip that seamlessly integrates lighting and video capabilities into a modular design. This twin-source unit offers high-power, long-throw white beams alongside high-brightness video and strobe features, with full pixel-level control. This integration facilitates diverse and dynamic lighting setups, suitable for a variety of professional stages and TV applications.
